default_one_way_monitoring.description: Generic one-way monitoring window. Safe default when no route-specific behavior is set.

tourism_mle_bkk_kul_one_way_plus7.description: Tourism-focused one-way extension for MLE, BKK, and KUL routes. Adds a +7 day outbound check on top of the common one-way monitoring set.

bangladesh_domestic_round_trip_short.description: Domestic Bangladesh return behavior. Keep return options very close to departure.

bangladesh_domestic_eid_round_trip_2026.description: Bangladesh domestic Eid travel window for 2026, focused on capital Dhaka to other domestic airports and the return wave back to Dhaka. Search outbound traffic through the pre-Eid peak and returns through the post-Eid return wave.

bangladesh_domestic_eid_capital_outbound.description: Bangladesh domestic Eid one-way outbound flow from capital Dhaka to other domestic airports before Eid.

bangladesh_domestic_eid_capital_return_o.description: Bangladesh domestic Eid one-way return flow back to capital Dhaka after Eid.

regional_round_trip_flexible.description: Short and medium regional round-trip behavior with near-term return flexibility.

worker_visa_outbound_to_middle_east_one_.description: Worker / visa outbound behavior from South Asia to the Middle East. Travel usually happens shortly after visa issuance.

worker_return_from_middle_east_long_wind.description: Long-window homebound behavior from the Middle East back to South Asia. Return plans can span one to eight months.

hub_spoke_or_longhaul_return_window.description: Hub-and-spoke / long-haul return pattern with wider return windows.

tourism_bkk_can_round_trip.description: Tourism-oriented routes such as Bangkok and Guangzhou.

holiday_return_routes_next7_departure_pl.description: Holiday return routes: search the next seven outbound departure dates, and for each departure check seven return options at three-day intervals.

inventory_anchor_departure_tracking_defa.description: Training-only inventory anchor profile. Repeatedly observe the same near-term departure horizon so forecasting can learn how quickly inventory fills or reopens and how fares react around that anchored departure date.

BD.name: eid_ul_fitr_2026_provisional
BD.notes: User-managed provisional Eid al-Fitr movement window with 10-day lead and lag.
